title: canna ellipticifolia
intro: Canna ellipticifolia, also known as the elliptical canna or wild canna, is a perennial plant species belonging to the canna family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various forms for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Canna ellipticifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or tincture, and its leaves are also used in teas and infusions for their medicinal properties.
